---

# Step 03 — Approval Actions (FC Edit Mode)

**Persona:** FC (Financial Controller)
**Module:** 3
**Section:** 3.1
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid` (edit mode)

---

## 3.1 Access Path

From Step 02 — PO Detail view mode: click **Edit** button (top right).

---

## 3.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> detail["2. PO Detail — View Mode"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode — Approval Actions"]
    edit -->|"All items Approved"| approve["Approve PO Dialog"]
    edit -->|"Any item Reviewed"| sendback["Send for Review Dialog"]
    edit -->|"Reject selected items"| reject["Reject PO Dialog"]
    approve -->|"Confirm"| completed(["PO Approved / Sent to Vendor"])
    sendback -->|"Confirm"| returned(["PO Returned to Purchaser"])
    reject -->|"Confirm"| rejected(["PO Rejected"])
    style edit fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3.3 Edit Mode Layout

When the FC clicks Edit, the top-right buttons change:

**View mode:** `[Edit] [Comment]`
**Edit mode:** `[× Cancel] [💾 Save] [🗑 Delete] [💬 Comment]`

All header fields remain **disabled** (read-only) for the FC in edit mode. The FC cannot modify any PO header data.

![FC Edit mode — no item selected (Cancel/Save/Delete/Comment visible; no action toolbar)](data:image/png;base64,)

![FC Edit mode — item selected (Approve/Review/Reject action toolbar appears)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 3.4 Item-Level Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Form states:**
> - **No item selected:** Only the items table is shown; no action buttons visible.
> - **One or more items selected:** Approve / Review / Reject action toolbar appears above the items table (top-right of Items section header).

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Appears When | Purpose |
|--------|-------|--------------|---------|
| Approve | Green | ≥1 item selected | Mark selected items as approved |
| Review | Amber/Orange | ≥1 item selected | Flag selected items for review / return |
| Reject | Red | ≥1 item selected | Reject selected items (with optional reason) |

### On Approve (item level)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Mark one or more items as approved. Applied immediately with no dialog. Staged in memory until the document-level Approve is confirmed.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected | — | Item status changes PENDING → APPROVED (green badge) | Button not visible |
| 2 | Item is in PENDING or REVIEW status | — | Status updated immediately in UI | TBC — behaviour with already-APPROVED items |

Applies immediately with no confirmation dialog. Item status badge changes to green APPROVED. The document-level **Approve** button appears in the page footer once items are actioned.

> ⚠️ **Important:** The item status change is **staged only**. Clicking **Cancel** in edit mode reverts all item statuses back to their original state (e.g. PENDING). Changes are only committed when the document-level **Approve** button is confirmed.

![Item 1 marked APPROVED — green badge; footer Approve button appears when all items actioned](data:image/png;base64,)

### On Review (item level)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Flag one or more items for review — signals that the FC needs clarification or corrections from the purchaser before these items can be approved.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected | — | Item status changes PENDING → REVIEW (yellow badge) | Button not visible |

Applies immediately with no confirmation dialog. Item status badge changes to yellow/amber REVIEW. The document-level **Send Back** button (amber) appears in the page footer.

![Item 1 marked REVIEW — amber badge; Send Back footer button appears](data:image/png;base64,)

### On Reject (item level)

**Purpose / Use Case:** Reject the entire purchase order with an optional reason. Unlike Approve and Review, Reject opens a confirmation dialog immediately.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | At least one item checkbox selected | — | "Reject Purchase Order" dialog opens | Button not visible |

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Reject Purchase Order" |
| Message | "Are you sure you want to reject this purchase order? Please provide a reason." |
| Reason field | Text area (0/256 chars) — **optional** |
| **Reject** button (Red) | Confirms rejection; enabled immediately (reason not required) |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; no item status change |

![Reject Purchase Order dialog — reason field optional](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 3.5 Document-Level Action Buttons

Document-level action buttons appear in the **page footer** (bottom-right) after the totals bar, based on the collective state of item-level decisions.

| Document Button | Appears when | Color |
|-----------------|-------------|-------|
| **Approve** | All items marked Approved | Green |
| **Send Back** | At least one item marked Review | Amber |

> **Note:** Reject does not produce a separate document-level button — the dialog opens directly from the item-level Reject button.

### On Document Approve

**Purpose / Use Case:** Finalize FC approval of the entire PO. Sends the PO to the vendor (or advances to the next workflow step).

**Confirmation Dialog:**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Approve Purchase Order" |
| Message | "Once approved, the PO will be sent to the vendor. Are you sure?" |
| **Approve** button (Green/Teal) | Confirms approval; PO status advances |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; no change |

![Document Approve confirmation — all 3 items APPROVED; Once approved, PO sent to vendor](data:image/png;base64,)

On FC approval, the PO is automatically sent to the vendor — no separate Purchaser send step. The purchaser sees the PO as SENT immediately after approval.

### On Document Send Back

**Purpose / Use Case:** Return the PO to the purchaser for corrections or clarification on items flagged as REVIEW.

**Confirmation Dialog ("Send for Review"):**

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | "Send for Review" |
| Message | "Select the stage to send this purchase order back to and provide a reason." |
| Item count | Shows count of items being returned (e.g. "1 item") |
| **STAGE** (required) | Radio group — currently only "Create Request" available |
| **REASON** (per item) | Text area per item (0/256 chars) — **required** |
| **Send Back** button (Amber) | Disabled until Reason is filled for each item |
| **Cancel** button (Outline) | Dismisses dialog; no change |

![Send for Review dialog — stage selection + reason per item required](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 3.6 Edit Mode Header Buttons

| Button | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| × Cancel | Exit edit mode; revert all staged item-level changes (items return to original status) |
| 💾 Save | Save changes (no approval action; use for description/remarks edits if unlocked) |
| 🗑 Delete | Delete the PO (opens confirmation dialog) |
| 💬 Comment | Open comment/attachment sidebar |

## 3.6a Bulk Action — Select Items Dialog

When the FC clicks the **Select All** checkbox (thead) in edit mode, the app shows a "Select Items" modal instead of directly selecting all rows:

| Option | Count | Behaviour |
|--------|-------|----------|
| **All items** | 3 | Select every item including those already decided (APPROVED, REVIEW, etc.) |
| **Pending only** ⭐ Recommended | 3 | Select only items still in PENDING status |

![Bulk action — Select Items dialog (appears when clicking Select All checkbox)](data:image/png;base64,)

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy / New Finding:** The "Select Items" dialog is not documented in the BRD. It provides a helpful UX affordance to avoid re-approving already-actioned items.

---

## 3.7 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | FC cannot edit any header field (Workflow, Vendor, Delivery Date, Currency, etc.) in edit mode | FC role permission |
| BR-02 | Item selection (checkbox) is required before Approve/Review/Reject buttons appear | Approval UX pattern |
| BR-03 | Approve and Review actions are applied immediately in UI but staged until document-level confirmation | Optimistic UI pattern |
| BR-04 | Cancel in edit mode reverts ALL staged item changes | Data integrity |
| BR-05 | Send Back requires a reason per item; Reject reason is optional | Approval workflow requirement |
| BR-06 | On FC approval, PO is auto-sent to vendor — no manual Send step for Purchaser | Confirmed auto-send |

---

## 3.8 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| FC selects some items Approved and some Review | Both "Approve" and "Send Back" document buttons appear; Send Back takes priority |
| FC clicks Cancel after approving items | All item statuses revert to PENDING |
| FC clicks Delete on an IN PROGRESS PO | Confirmation dialog appears; PO deleted if confirmed |
| PO has 0 items | Items table empty; no Approve/Review/Reject toolbar possible |
| FC approves items then refreshes page without confirming | Staged changes lost; items revert to PENDING |
| Send Back Reason field is empty | Send Back button in dialog remains disabled |
| Reject: reason provided but Cancel clicked | No action taken; item status unchanged |
| Multiple items: FC approves some and leaves others PENDING | Document Approve button does NOT appear; all items must be actioned |

---

## 3.9 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Cancel (edit mode) | Returns to view mode (same PO detail page, Step 02) |
| Confirm Approve | PO advances to next status (confirmed / sent to vendor) |
| Confirm Send Back | PO returned to purchaser; FC exits to My Approval list |
| Confirm Reject | PO rejected; FC exits to My Approval list |

---

## 3.10 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| PATCH | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/items/:itemId/status` | Update item approval status |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/approve` | Submit document-level approval |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/send-back` | Submit Send for Review with stage + reasons |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-order/:uuid/reject` | Submit rejection with optional reason |
